  1. org.springframework.cloud.task.listener.annotation

Uses of Package
org.springframework.cloud.task.listener.annotation

Packages that use org.springframework.cloud.task.listener.annotation
Package
Description
io.spring.configuration
Configuration classes for the multiple datasources sample application.
io.spring.taskobservations
Task observations sample application for Spring Cloud Task.
org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration
Interfaces for configuring Spring Cloud Task and a default implementations.
org.springframework.cloud.task.listener
Stream-based task lifecycle listener support for Spring Cloud Task.
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.listener.annotation used by io.spring.configuration
    Class
    Description
    BeforeTask
    TaskExecutionListener.onTaskStartup(TaskExecution).
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.listener.annotation used by io.spring.taskobservations
    Class
    Description
    AfterTask
    TaskExecutionListener.onTaskEnd(TaskExecution).
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.listener.annotation used by org.springframework.cloud.task.configuration
    Class
    Description
    AfterTask
    TaskExecutionListener.onTaskEnd(TaskExecution).
    BeforeTask
    TaskExecutionListener.onTaskStartup(TaskExecution).
    FailedTask
    TaskExecutionListener.onTaskFailed(TaskExecution, Throwable).
  • Classes in org.springframework.cloud.task.listener.annotation used by org.springframework.cloud.task.listener
    Class
    Description
    TaskListenerExecutor
    Identifies all beans that contain a TaskExecutionListener annotation and stores the associated method so that it can be called by the TaskExecutionListener at the appropriate time.
